title: Effectiveness of IASTM and MFR in Mechanical Low Back Pain
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"eh0ai","text":"It is a randomized clinical trial that will compare the effectiveness of IASTM and MFR on pain and morphological changes of thoracolumbar fascia in mechanical low back pain. All the participants will be randomized into two groups: one receiving weekly IASTM sessions for 4 weeks, and the other receiving MFR 3 times/week over the same period.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fgfth","text":"This study will provide evidence on finding the significant changes in TLF morphology and pain reduction between two interventions. Findings may guide future physiotherapy techniques for thoracolumbar fascia dysfunction.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
